content:
道交者，父子也，出於是非賢愚之外，故久。

  **所出**：《關尹子 · 9》 — https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/關尹子/9
summary: A philosophical observation that the natural communication of the Dao resembles the bond between father and son—transcending judgments of right/wrong and wisdom/foolishness, and thus enduring eternally.
title: 道交-之
